title: Are the API docs down?
excerpt:
Hi folks, 
It looks like api.developer.monday.com has been down for the past two hours. 
Is there some scheduled maintenance that I’m not aware of? 
Here’s the message I get when I go there:

The creators …

posts.author: aalnussairi (Ahmed Al-Nussairi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi folks,

It looks like api.developer.monday.com has been down for the past two hours.

Is there some scheduled maintenance that I’m not aware of?

Here’s the message I get when I go there:

Not Yet Active

The creators of this project are still working on making everything perfect!

Admin Login

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there!

We are having a technical issue with the API documentation. It is under investigation and should be resolved soon
